structural.check: all segments have non-empty demographics.party_breakdown and demographics.age_distribution

judge.description: Do the voter segments represent meaningful, distinct groups? Are tier assignments (priority ordering) reasonable? Rate 1-5.
Are recommended_channels and outreach_priority appropriate for each segment's demographics? Rate 1-5.
Do geographic_clusters provide useful canvassing prioritization? Are density rankings reasonable? Rate 1-5.
Do individual voter records look plausible (real addresses, reasonable ages, consistent party labels)? Rate 1-5.
